item.title: Fine margins separate Man City and Arsenal in a heated Premier League title race
item.description: Manchester City's race with Arsenal might go until the very end.

item.title: Why Rosenior failed at Chelsea, and what club must change for next manager
item.description: Liam Rosenior couldn't win over Chelsea's players or fans as manager. Now the club's owners must reevaluate the structure that led to his appointment.

item.title: Our NFL draft-day mock: Yates' final predictions for all 32 picks, plus Kiper's notes
item.description: Field Yates projects the first 32 draft picks one last time -- including a trade -- and Mel Kiper Jr. shares what he's hearing heading into Round 1 (8...

item.title: West playoff takeaways: Thunder cruise past Suns for 2-0 lead
item.description: Here's what has stood out from the latest playoff games of the Western Conference's first round.

item.title: MLB Power Rankings: Who are the top teams one month into the season?
item.description: A new No. 2 and an NL-heavy top 10 dominate our rankings four weeks into the 2026 season.
